title: Wildly Tangy Brazilian Chicken Skewers
description: A tangy and indulgent Brazilian dish featuring ketchup and grilled to perfection on a binchotan grill, this recipe is low in carbs and big on flavor. It's perfect for a summer dinner or snack.
instructions: Preheat the binchotan grill to medium high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together ketchup, lime juice, olive oil, garlic, salt, black pepper, and paprika.
Add the chicken pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated chicken onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the skewers for 10 minutes, turning occasionally, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Simmer the remaining marinade in a saucepan over low heat for 5 minutes, or until slightly thickened.
Serve the grilled chicken skewers with the simmered marinade spooned over the top.
Garnish with fresh cilantro or scallions, if desired.
